title: Multilingual Voice Talent (Regional Accents & Conversational Speech)  Remote | Freelance / Independent Contractor | Project-Based
description:
Role Overview
Agents Only Technologies Inc. is seeking Multilingual Voice Talents to support AI voice, speech, and conversational recording projects across multiple languages and regional accents.
We're looking for individuals who can naturally speak one or more supported languages while accurately representing authentic regional accents or dialects. Depending on project requirements, contributors may record conversational dialogue, scripted prompts, character-style performances, emotional speech, or spontaneous interactions used to improve next-generation AI voice technologies.
Whether you're an experienced voice actor, content creator, broadcaster, performer, or simply someone with clear, expressive speech and an authentic regional accent, we'd love to hear from you.

What You'll Do
Voice Recording & Performance
Record natural conversational speech for AI language projects.
Perform scripted and semi-scripted dialogue.
Deliver expressive performances using appropriate tone, pacing, and emotion.
Represent authentic regional accents or dialects when required.
Follow pronunciation, timing, and recording guidelines.
Complete recording assignments within project timelines.

Quality & Project Compliance
Produce clean, high-quality audio recordings.
Minimize background noise and recording interruptions.
Review recordings before submission.
Follow project instructions and quality standards consistently.
Maintain confidentiality regarding project materials.
Communicate with project coordinators when clarification is needed.

Languages & Regional Accents We Are Seeking
We welcome contributors who can naturally speak one or more of the following:
• English (American, British, Australian)
• Turkish (Standard – Istanbul)
• Polish (Standard)
• Swedish (Standard – Stockholm)
• Dutch (Standard, Flemish)
• European Portuguese (Standard)
• Arabic (Saudi, Jordanian, Modern Standard Arabic, Tunisian, Moroccan, Egyptian)
• Indonesian (Standard Jakarta, Javanese, Medan)
• Japanese (Standard, Kansai, Hakata)
• Korean (Standard Seoul, Jeolla, Busan, Chungcheong)
• Brazilian Portuguese (Standard, Northeastern Brazilian, Mineiro)
• European Spanish (Standard Castellano, Catalan-influenced, Andalusian)
• Latin American Spanish (Mexican, Colombian, Argentinian, Chilean, Peruvian, American Spanish)
• Thai (Standard Bangkok, Northeastern, Southern)
• French (Parisian, Quebec, Swiss, African French)
• German (Standard, Bavarian, Saxon)
• Italian (Standard, Roman, Tuscan, Neapolitan)
• Russian (Standard, Caucasian)
• Vietnamese (Hanoi/Northern, Saigon/Southern, Hue/Central)
• Malay (Standard)
• Filipino (Tagalog) (Standard)

What You Bring
Required Experience
Fluency in at least one supported language.
Ability to naturally speak the required regional accent or dialect, when applicable.
Strong verbal communication skills.
Comfortable reading scripts and delivering natural speech.
Ability to follow detailed recording instructions.
Reliable internet connection.
Access to a computer or mobile device capable of recording audio.
Ability to work independently and meet project deadlines.

Preferred Experience
Experience in any of the following is a plus:
Voice acting
Narration
Podcasting
Broadcasting
Acting or theatre
Streaming
Content creation
Radio
Audiobook narration
Dubbing
Language instruction
Customer support
Public speaking
Experience using microphones, recording software, or home recording equipment is also beneficial but not required.
